'''''Ewoks Annual''''' was a [[1988]] [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|UK]]-only compilation of selected stories from [[Marvel Comics|Marvel's]] [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Star Wars: Ewoks'' (1985)]] comic book series, along with some short prose pieces.<ref name="Annuals">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-in-the-uk-star-wars-comic-book-annuals|text=''Star Wars'' in the UK: ''Star Wars'' Comic Book Annuals}}</ref>

The prose stories were not reprinted until [[2016]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Droids & Ewoks Omnibus]]'' from Marvel,<ref name="D&E Omnibus">''[[Star Wars: Droids & Ewoks Omnibus]]''</ref> followed shortly by [[2017]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Marvel UK Collection Omnibus]]''.<ref name="Marvel UK Collection">''[[Star Wars: The Marvel UK Collection Omnibus]]''</ref>

{{Book-stub}}

==Contents==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 9|''The Underwater Kingdom'']] {{C|Reprinted from ''Ewoks 9''}}
*"[[Chief Chirpa Kidnapped!]]"
*"[[Return of the Great One!]]"
*[[Ewoks (1985) 2|''Rites of Power'']] {{C|Reprinted from ''Ewoks 2''}}
*"[[The Ice Princess!]]"
